title: Junior Developers Backend and Frontend
full_description:
Larsen & Toubro- Vyoma, from the house of L&T, delivers next-gen AI-powered cloud and data center solutions designed for digital-first enterprises. Our hyperconnected AI ecosystem offers: 🔹 Hyperscale-ready Data Centers 🔹 GPU-as-a-Service & AI Infrastructure 🔹 Cloud, Colocation & Managed Services 🔹 Network Security & Compliance 🔹 Sustainable, energy-efficient operations Backed by L&T’s legacy and tech partnerships, we enable secure, scalable, and future-ready digital infrastructure — tailored for enterprises, government, and innovators.

Job Responsibilities

Assist in module development- Write testable, maintainable code- Support bug fixes and enhancements

Educational Qualifications

(Degree, training, or certification required)

Relevant Experience

(No of years of technical & functional experience required )


3-6 years of experience


Key Skills


Backend/frontend fundamentals- API consumption & integration- Test-driven development (TDD)- Git workflows

title: React Developer
full_description:
Job Title: React Developer

Job Summary:

We are looking for a skilled and motivated React Developer with 2 years of hands-on experience in building modern web applications. The ideal candidate should have strong knowledge of JavaScript, React.js, and front-end development best practices, along with a passion for creating seamless user experiences.

Key Responsibilities:

Develop and maintain user-facing features using React.js

Build reusable components and front-end libraries for future use

Translate UI/UX designs into high-quality, responsive code

Optimize applications for maximum performance and scalability

Collaborate with backend developers, designers, and product teams

Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code

Debug and troubleshoot issues across browsers and devices

Participate in code reviews and team discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:

2+ years of experience in front-end development

Strong proficiency in JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, and CSS3

Hands-on experience with React.js and its core principles

Experience with state management libraries (Redux, Context API)

Familiarity with RESTful APIs and integration

Knowledge of version control systems like Git

Understanding of responsive design and cross-browser compatibility

Basic knowledge of modern build tools (Webpack, Vite, Babel)

Preferred Skills (Good to Have):

Experience with TypeScript

Familiarity with Next.js or other React frameworks

Knowledge of testing frameworks (Jest, React Testing Library)

Understanding of Agile/Scrum methodologies

Exposure to CI/CD pipelines

Soft Skills:

Strong problem-solving ability

Good communication and teamwork skills

Attention to detail

Ability to work in a fast-paced environment

Education:

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or a related field (or equivalent experience)

Location: [Sector 2 Noida ]

Experience Required: 2+ Years

Employment Type: Full-time

Job Types: Full-time, Permanent

Pay: ₹35,000.00 - ₹40,000.00 per month

Benefits:

Health insurance

Education:

Bachelor's (Required)

Experience:

React: 2 years (Required)

Location:

Noida, Uttar Pradesh (Required)

Work Location: In person
